global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with the game and shop.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'VoxelRealm' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: The text reads 'Level up today' in a large, bold font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: The text 'No ads in first week' is smaller and positioned directly below the main body text.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small icon representing gameplay, located near the top of the ad, featuring simple geometric shapes.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another small gameplay icon, similar in style to the previous one, positioned next to it.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Shop now' at the bottom of the ad, designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing gameplay, located in the center area of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another small circular gameplay icon, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small circular gameplay icon, located at the top right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'Level up today' is bold and centrally placed, drawing immediate attention.
elements.text_content: Level up today No ads in first week

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: The logo 'VoxelRealm' is displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button labeled 'Shop now' at the bottom of the ad, encouraging users to take action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
